name: Fabada Asturiana
description: Guiso de fabes cocinado a fuego lento, con carnes ahumadas y un toque de pimentón.

en.name: Fabada Asturiana
en.description: A slow-simmered bean stew from the Asturian highlands, with smoky cured meats and a touch of paprika.

name: Cachopo de Cabrales
description: Dos filetes de ternera empanados y rellenos de queso Cabrales fundido y jamón serrano, fritos al momento.

en.name: Cachopo de Cabrales
en.description: Two breaded veal fillets folded around melted Cabrales blue cheese and serrano ham, fried to order.

name: Oricios al Natural
description: Erizos de mar servidos crudos en su concha, recién llegados de la costa cantábrica, con un toque de limón.

en.name: Sea Urchin, Natural
en.description: Sea urchin served raw in the shell, straight off the Cantabrian coast, with a squeeze of lemon.

name: Tortos de Maíz con Picadillo
description: Tortas de maíz crujientes cubiertas de picadillo de cerdo especiado y huevo frito.

en.name: Corn Tortos with Picadillo
en.description: Crisp corn flatbreads topped with spiced minced pork and a fried egg.

name: Merluza a la Sidra
description: Lomo de merluza cocinado en salsa de sidra y perejil, con almejas y patata.

en.name: Hake in Cider Sauce
en.description: Hake fillet gently cooked in a cider and parsley sauce with clams and potato.

name: Queso de Cabrales con Miel
description: Queso azul de cueva de los Picos de Europa, con un hilo de miel local y nueces.

en.name: Cabrales Cheese with Honey
en.description: Cave-aged blue cheese from the Picos de Europa, drizzled with local honey and walnuts.

name: Arroz con Leche Quemado
description: Cremoso arroz con leche asturiano, frío, terminado con una capa de azúcar caramelizada.

en.name: Burnt Rice Pudding
en.description: Creamy Asturian rice pudding, chilled and finished with a caramelised sugar crust.

name: Sidra Natural (Botella)
description: Sidra natural seca de un llagar local, escanciada desde lo alto al estilo tradicional.

en.name: Natural Cider (Bottle)
en.description: Dry natural cider from a local cider house, poured from height in the traditional style.

name: Pote Asturiano
description: Guiso de montaña con alubias blancas, berza, patata y carnes curadas.

en.name: Pote Asturiano
en.description: A hearty highland stew of white beans, cabbage, potato and cured pork.

name: Casadielles Fritas
description: Empanadillas rellenas de nuez y anís, fritas y espolvoreadas con azúcar.

en.name: Fried Casadielles
en.description: Pastry parcels filled with walnut and anise, fried and dusted with sugar.
